_configVersion_comment: DO NOT MODIFY: This field is used by NeoEssentials for automatic config updates.

chat.chat-format-description: Chat format template. You can use a string (for global format) or an object for per-group/world formats. Keys: 'default', 'group:GROUPNAME', 'world:WORLDNAME', or 'group:GROUP:world:WORLD'. Placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {MESSAGE}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, {neoessentials_world}, {neoessentials_x}, {neoessentials_y}, {neoessentials_z}, {neoessentials_health}, {neoessentials_level}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase placeholders like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX}, {SUFFIX} are automatically converted for backwards compatibility. Use '&' for color codes (e.g., &c for red, &6 for gold).
chat.enableChatEnhancements_comment: Enable Phase 2 chat enhancements (clickable names, mentions, URLs, item links). Set to false to use basic chat formatting only.
chat.clickablePlayerNames_comment: Make player names in chat clickable. Click to message, hover for stats.
chat.autoLinkUrls_comment: Automatically detect and make URLs clickable in chat messages.
chat.allowItemLinks_comment: Allow players to show their held item in chat using [item] placeholder.

mentions.enabled_comment: Enable @mention system. Players can mention others with @PlayerName.
mentions.highlightColor_comment: Color code for highlighted mentions (e.g., &e for yellow, &6 for gold).
mentions.playSound_comment: Play sound notification when a player is mentioned.
mentions.soundName_comment: Sound to play for mentions. Options: entity.experience_orb.pickup, block.note_block.pling, etc.
mentions.requirePermission_comment: If true, players need 'neoessentials.chat.mention' permission to mention others.

badges.enabled_comment: Enable badge/icon system. Shows rank badges and status icons in chat.
badges.useCustomImages_comment: If true, uses custom badge images from config/neoessentials/badges/ folder. Place PNG files named after ranks (e.g., admin.png, vip.png).
badges.customImageSize_comment: Size of custom badge images in pixels (16, 24, or 32). Images will be scaled to this size.
badges.customImagePath_comment: Path to custom badge images folder relative to server root. Place PNG files here named after ranks.
badges.autoSendResourcePack_comment: If true, automatically generates and sends resource pack to players when they join. Requires useCustomImages to be enabled.
badges.requireResourcePack_comment: If true, players MUST accept the resource pack to join the server. If false, it's optional.
badges.resourcePackUrl_comment: Public URL where the resource pack is hosted (e.g., https://yoursite.com/NeoEssentials-Badges.zip). Leave empty to disable auto-send. The mod will generate the pack in config/neoessentials/ - upload it to a web server.
badges.resourcePackPrompt: This server uses custom badge images. Please accept the resource pack for the best experience!
badges.resourcePackPrompt_comment: Message shown to players when sending the resource pack.
badges.rankBadges_comment: Badge emojis for each rank. If useCustomImages is true, the mod looks for <rankname>.png files in the badges folder.

statusIcons.enabled_comment: Show status icons (AFK, vanished, etc.) in chat.

capsFilter.maxPercentage_comment: Maximum percentage of caps allowed (1-100). Messages above this are filtered.
capsFilter.action_comment: Action to take: 'lowercase' (convert to lowercase), 'block' (block message), 'warn' (warn player).
capsFilter.minimumLength_comment: Minimum message length to check caps (avoid filtering short messages like 'OK').

repeatFilter.enabled_comment: Prevent players from repeating identical messages.
repeatFilter.cooldownSeconds_comment: Seconds before same message can be sent again.

spamFilter.enabled_comment: Rate limit chat messages to prevent spam.
spamFilter.periodSeconds_comment: Period in seconds to count messages.

formatTemplates.enabled_comment: Enable pre-built format templates. When enabled, uses 'activeTemplate' instead of 'chat-format'.

richText.enabled_comment: Enable Phase 4 rich text effects (gradients, rainbow). Note: These effects require permissions and can be performance-intensive.
richText.allowGradients_comment: Allow gradient text using <gradient:START-END>text</gradient> syntax. Example: <gradient:FF0000-0000FF>Hello</gradient>
richText.requirePermission_comment: If true, players need 'neoessentials.chat.richtext' permission to use rich text effects.

conditionalFormatting.enabled_comment: Enable Phase 4 conditional formatting. Allows dynamic chat formats based on time, stats, and player state.
conditionalFormatting.allowTimeConditionals_comment: Allow time-based conditions: <if:time=morning>Good morning!</if>. Supported: morning, afternoon, evening, night, day, weekday, weekend.
conditionalFormatting.allowStatConditionals_comment: Allow stat-based conditions: <if:health<50>Low health!</if>. Supported: health, level, food, armor, xp with operators <, >, <=, >=, =, !=
conditionalFormatting.allowStateConditionals_comment: Allow state-based conditions: <if:afk>AFK</if>. Supported: afk, vanished, flying, creative, survival, spectator, op, sneaking, sprinting, swimming, onfire, wet, underground, nether, end, overworld.

channels.enabled-description: Master switch for chat channels system. When false, all channels are disabled and players use default global chat. When true, channels work according to their individual settings below.

discord.enabled_comment: Send local chat messages to Discord. Usually disabled since local is proximity-based.
discord.channelId_comment: Discord channel ID to send messages to. Leave empty to use default 'chat' channel. Get ID by right-clicking channel in Discord (Developer Mode enabled).

discord.enabled_comment: Send global chat messages to Discord.
discord.channelId_comment: Discord channel ID to send messages to. Leave empty to use default 'chat' channel.

discord.enabled_comment: Send staff chat messages to Discord.
discord.channelId_comment: Discord channel ID for staff chat. Leave empty to use default 'staff' or 'moderation' channel. Recommended to use a private staff-only Discord channel.

chat.channels-description: Chat channels system: Set 'enabled' to false to disable all channels and use standard global chat. When enabled, players can use local (proximity-based), global (all players), and staff (permission-based) channels. Each channel has its own enabled flag, command, prefix, and settings. For proximity-only servers: set channels.enabled=true, local.enabled=true, global.enabled=false. For global-only servers: set channels.enabled=false OR set local.enabled=false, global.enabled=true.
chat.logChatToConsole_comment: Log all chat messages to the server console and logs. When NeoEssentials handles chat formatting, vanilla console logging is replaced by this. Set to false to suppress chat from console/logs entirely.
chat.customJoinMessage_comment: Custom join message template. Use 'none' for default. Available placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, {neoessentials_world}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX} also work. Use '&' for colors. Example: '&a{neoessentials_prefix}&f{neoessentials_displayname} &ejoined the server!'
chat.customQuitMessage_comment: Custom quit message template. Use 'none' for default. Available placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, {neoessentials_world}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX} also work. Use '&' for colors. Example: '&c{neoessentials_prefix}&f{neoessentials_displayname} &eleft the server!'
chat.customNewUsernameMessage_comment: Custom message for player name changes. Use 'none' for default. Available placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX} also work. Use '&' for colors. Example: '&6{neoessentials_prefix}&f{neoessentials_displayname} &echanged their name!'
